title: pluchea paniculata var. gracilis
intro: Pluchea paniculata var. gracilis, also known as slender bushy-fleabane, is a plant species within the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its essential oils and sesquiterpene lactones, which exhibit anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Pluchea paniculata var. gracilis include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, where it is often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its effects.
